about.slogan: Your personal spark for creativity & code

sessionSidebar.title: Task List
sessionSidebar.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this session?

skillSettings.title: Skill Store
skillSettings.subtitle: Extend AI assistant's professional capabilities · Enabled
skillSettings.noMatchDesc: Try using different keywords to search
skillSettings.emptyDesc: Add a skill folder in your project's .geni/skills directory to be automatically discovered

generalSettings.autoStartDesc: Run application automatically on system startup

modelSettings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete "{{key}}" config?
modelSettings.modelDesc: Manually enter the model ID to use, e.g.: gpt-4o

personaSettings.title: Persona Settings
personaSettings.desc: Define the Agent's identity, behavior guidelines, and response style
personaSettings.promptPlaceholder: Enter system prompt to customize Agent behavior...
personaSettings.expertDesc: The system prompt is the 'soul' of the Agent. You can modify it to change its working language, style, and tool priority. Changes take effect on the next conversation.

coreToolSettings.title: Built-in Core Tools
coreToolSettings.desc: Manage enable status and authorization policies of built-in core tools.
coreToolSettings.authNoteDesc: Setting to 'Auto-approve' allows the AI to execute the tool directly without confirmation. For safety, it is recommended to use this mode only for read-only operations.

mcpSettings.enableDesc: Tools will be loaded automatically when enabled
mcpSettings.name: Name
mcpSettings.urlDesc: SSE endpoint address, usually ends with /sse
mcpSettings.commandDesc: Command to start the MCP server
mcpSettings.notConnectedDesc: Please connect the server in 'General Settings' to view available tools
mcpSettings.noServerDesc: Select a server from the left list to configure

imSettings.title: Telegram Bot
imSettings.desc: Setup a Telegram Bot to summon your Geni agent on your mobile device.
imSettings.tokenDesc: Search @BotFather in Telegram to create a new Bot and get its Token.
imSettings.proxyDesc: Use a proxy if your network cannot connect to Telegram directly.
